create_step.description: Create a GitHub issue for a plan step and project it into the project board with all required metadata.

step_id.description: Canonical identifier from the plan (e.g., STEP‑001)

repo.description: GitHub repository in the form owner/repo

title.description: Issue title; often derived from the step summary

body.description: Rendered markdown representing the step contract

phase_id.description: Plan phase identifier to set in the project (e.g., PH‑01)

milestone_group.description: Delivery grouping to map to a milestone; optional

plan_hash.description: Hash of the plan at generation time

projection_version.description: Projection version number from the plan

labels.description: Optional list of labels to apply

preconditions: step_id exists in the plan and has not been linked to an issue unless overwrite is explicitly allowed
config/github_field_registry.json exists and contains IDs for project node, StepID field, Phase field, Status field, PlanHash field and ProjectionVersion field
authentication via GitHub App installation token is available

api_calls.name: create_issue
api_calls.description: Creates the issue in the target repository with title, body, labels and assignees

api_calls.name: add_item_to_project
api_calls.description: Adds the created issue as an item in the target project

api_calls.name: set_step_id_field
api_calls.description: Sets the StepID field for the project item using the text value of step_id

api_calls.name: set_phase_field
api_calls.description: Sets the Phase field to the selected option corresponding to phase_id

api_calls.name: set_status_field
api_calls.description: Optionally sets the Status field to the default value (e.g., Todo) if the CLI is the writer for that field

api_calls.name: set_plan_hash_field
api_calls.description: Sets the PlanHash field using the text value of plan_hash

api_calls.name: set_projection_version_field
api_calls.description: Sets the ProjectionVersion field using text or number value

api_calls.name: create_milestone_if_needed
api_calls.description: Creates a milestone if milestone_group is provided and a milestone with that title does not already exist

api_calls.name: assign_issue_to_milestone
api_calls.description: Assigns the created issue to the milestone by setting the milestone number

local_writes: Update config/step_issue_linkage.json with step_id → issue_number, issue_node_id, project_item_id, milestone title and timestamps
Record projection metadata (e.g., plan_hash, projection_version) in the linkage entry

failure_codes.STEP_ALREADY_EXISTS: The step_id is already linked to a GitHub issue
failure_codes.STEP_NOT_FOUND: The step_id does not exist in the plan
failure_codes.FIELD_REGISTRY_MISSING: Field registry file is missing or incomplete
failure_codes.API_ERROR: GitHub API returned an error during issue or project mutations
failure_codes.AUTH_ERROR: Authentication failed or GitHub App token could not be retrieved
failure_codes.UNKNOWN_ERROR: An unexpected error occurred during create_step

create_subissue.description: Create a child issue under a parent issue and optionally project it into the project board

parent_step_id.description: The step_id of the parent issue

child_step_id.description: The step_id of the child sub-issue

repo.description: GitHub repository in the form owner/repo

title.description: Optional title for the child issue; derived from plan if omitted

body.description: Optional body for the child issue; derived from plan if omitted

phase_id.description: Optional phase identifier for the child issue

preconditions: parent_step_id exists in the plan and is linked to a GitHub issue
child_step_id is not already linked to a GitHub issue unless overwrite is explicitly allowed
Field registry loaded for project operations if projecting child into project

api_calls.name: create_child_issue_if_needed
api_calls.description: Creates the child issue if it does not already exist

api_calls.name: add_sub_issue
api_calls.description: Adds the child issue as a sub-issue under the parent issue using the child issue ID

api_calls.name: add_child_item_to_project
api_calls.description: Optionally adds the child issue to the project board

api_calls.name: set_child_metadata_fields
api_calls.description: Optionally sets StepID, Phase, PlanHash and ProjectionVersion fields for the child project item

local_writes: Update config/step_issue_linkage.json with child_step_id → issue_number mapping and its parent_step_id
Record project item IDs and metadata for the child if added to the project

failure_codes.PARENT_NOT_LINKED: The parent step is not linked to any GitHub issue
failure_codes.CHILD_ALREADY_EXISTS: The child_step_id is already linked to an issue
failure_codes.CHILD_NOT_FOUND: child_step_id does not exist in the plan
failure_codes.API_ERROR: GitHub API returned an error while creating or linking the sub-issue
failure_codes.AUTH_ERROR: Authentication failed when performing API operations
failure_codes.UNKNOWN_ERROR: An unexpected error occurred during create_subissue

assign_milestone.description: Ensure a milestone exists and assign one or more issues to it

steps.description: List of step_ids to assign to the milestone

repo.description: GitHub repository in the form owner/repo

due_on.description: Optional ISO 8601 due date for the milestone

preconditions: milestone_title corresponds to a valid delivery grouping in the plan
Each step_id in steps is linked to a GitHub issue

api_calls.name: list_milestones
api_calls.description: Retrieves existing milestones to determine if the milestone already exists

api_calls.name: create_milestone_if_absent
api_calls.description: Creates the milestone with the given title, description and due date if not found

api_calls.name: assign_milestone_to_issues
api_calls.description: Assigns each issue to the milestone by setting the milestone number

local_writes: Update local linkage entries with milestone assignment if necessary

failure_codes.INVALID_MILESTONE_GROUP: milestone_title does not map to a valid grouping in the plan
failure_codes.STEP_ISSUE_NOT_FOUND: One or more steps do not have a linked issue
failure_codes.API_ERROR: GitHub API returned an error during milestone creation or assignment
failure_codes.AUTH_ERROR: Authentication failed when performing API operations
failure_codes.UNKNOWN_ERROR: An unexpected error occurred during assign_milestone

sync_phase.description: Sync the plan phase assignments to project items, writing plan metadata but not advancing lifecycle phases unless authorized

phase_id.description: The phase identifier to sync (e.g., PH‑02); use 'all' to sync all phases

plan_path.description: Filesystem path to the plan JSON to read assignments from

repo.description: GitHub repository in the form owner/repo

mode.description: projection: align GitHub to plan; advancement: only update phase when evaluator authorizes transition

preconditions: phase_id exists in the plan or is 'all'
Field registry file loaded and contains IDs for Phase, PlanHash, ProjectionVersion, StepID fields
For advancement mode: evaluator output exists (e.g., phase_advancement_report.json and phase_transition_decision.json) and authorizes changes

api_calls.name: ensure_items_in_project
api_calls.description: For each step with a linked issue, ensure it is represented as a project item

api_calls.name: update_phase_field
api_calls.description: Set the Phase field to the desired option; only in projection mode or when advancement is authorized

api_calls.name: update_plan_hash_field
api_calls.description: Update the PlanHash field with the current plan hash

api_calls.name: update_projection_version_field
api_calls.description: Update the ProjectionVersion field with the current projection version

api_calls.name: update_status_field_if_owned
api_calls.description: Optionally update the Status field if the CLI is the owner of the transition; otherwise leave it to built‑in workflows

local_writes: Generate a sync report summarizing items updated and skipped (e.g., sync_phase_report.json)

failure_codes.PLAN_NOT_FOUND: The plan file cannot be read
failure_codes.INVALID_PHASE: The provided phase_id does not exist in the plan
failure_codes.FIELD_REGISTRY_MISSING: Field registry file is missing or incomplete
failure_codes.ADVANCEMENT_NOT_AUTHORIZED: Advancement mode requested but evaluator output is missing or denies transition
failure_codes.API_ERROR: GitHub API returned an error during project item or field updates
failure_codes.AUTH_ERROR: Authentication failed when performing API operations
failure_codes.UNKNOWN_ERROR: An unexpected error occurred during sync_phase

reconcile_drift.description: Detect and correct drift between plan/package desired state and the current GitHub state, classifying differences and applying safe corrections

plan_path.description: Path to the plan or plan package used as the desired state

repo.description: GitHub repository in the form owner/repo

project_id.description: Project node ID for the GitHub project to reconcile

override_registry_path.description: Optional path to a registry of approved overrides for plan fields

preconditions: plan_path exists and can be parsed
Field registry and step linkage files are loaded
Authentication via GitHub App token is available
project_id corresponds to a valid project

api_calls.name: query_project_items_and_fields
api_calls.description: Retrieve all items in the project along with StepID, Phase, Status, PlanHash, ProjectionVersion, EvidenceState and GateStatus field values

api_calls.name: query_issue_states
api_calls.description: Retrieve current issue properties (open/closed, milestone, labels, etc.) for each linked step

api_calls.name: correct_missing_item
api_calls.description: Create and project a new issue for steps found in the plan but missing in GitHub

api_calls.name: correct_field_value
api_calls.description: Correct automation‑owned fields (StepID, Phase, Status, PlanHash, ProjectionVersion, EvidenceState, GateStatus) when they drift from the plan and are not covered by overrides

api_calls.name: create_missing_issue
api_calls.description: Create a GitHub issue for a plan step that lacks any linked issue

local_writes: Write reconciliation_report.json summarizing observed state, drift classifications and corrective actions
Update step_issue_linkage.json with newly created issues and project item IDs

failure_codes.PLAN_NOT_FOUND: The plan file cannot be read
failure_codes.FIELD_REGISTRY_MISSING: Field registry or linkage file is missing or incomplete
failure_codes.PROJECT_NOT_FOUND: The specified project_id does not exist or cannot be queried
failure_codes.API_ERROR: GitHub API returned an error during query or correction operations
failure_codes.AUTH_ERROR: Authentication failed when performing API operations
failure_codes.UNKNOWN_ERROR: An unexpected error occurred during reconcile_drift
